payload.content: import { z } from "zod"; const UserSchema = z.object({name:z.string().min(1),email:z.string().email(),age:z.number().min(0)}); export function validateUser(d){return UserSchema.safeParse(d);}
import { z } from "zod"; const LoginSchema = z.object({email:z.string().email(),password:z.string().min(8)}); export function validateLogin(d){return LoginSchema.safeParse(d);}

payload.content: import { z } from "zod"; const UserSchema = z.object({name:z.string().min(1),email:z.string().email(),age:z.number().min(0)}); export function validateUser(d){const r=UserSchema.safeParse(d);if(!r.success)throw new Error("Validation failed");return r.data;}

import { z } from "zod"; const PaymentSchema = z.object({amount:z.number().positive(),currency:z.string().length(3),method:z.enum(["credit","debit","transfer"])}); export function validatePayment(d){return PaymentSchema.safeParse(d);}

import { z } from "zod"; const PaymentSchema = z.object({amount:z.number().positive(),currency:z.string().length(3),method:z.enum(["credit","debit","transfer"])}); export function validatePayment(d){return PaymentSchema.safeParse(d);}

import { z } from "zod"; const OrderSchema = z.object({userId:z.string().uuid(),items:z.array(z.object({productId:z.string(),quantity:z.number().positive()})),total:z.number().positive()}); export function validateOrder(d){return OrderSchema.safeParse(d);}

import { z } from "zod"; const NotificationSchema = z.object({recipient:z.string().email(),subject:z.string().min(1).max(200),body:z.string().min(1),priority:z.enum(["low","medium","high"])}); export function validateNotification(d){return NotificationSchema.safeParse(d);}

import { z } from "zod"; const OrderSchema = z.object({userId:z.string().uuid(),items:z.array(z.object({productId:z.string(),quantity:z.number().positive()})),total:z.number().positive()}); export function validateOrder(d){const r=OrderSchema.safeParse(d);if(!r.success)throw new Error("Order validation failed");return r.data;}

import { z } from "zod"; const NotificationSchema = z.object({recipient:z.string().email(),subject:z.string().min(1).max(200),body:z.string().min(1),priority:z.enum(["low","medium","high"])}); export function validateNotification(d){const r=NotificationSchema.safeParse(d);if(!r.success)throw new Error("Notification validation failed");return r.data;}
